notes: Momentum coef = +0.107 goals of next-game GD per +1 goal of average in-tournament GD so far, controlling for pre-tournament Elo. n=1439 (team, next-game) pairs from 964 WC-finals matches across 22 tournaments. STATISTICALLY SIGNIFICANT at p<0.05 (p=0.000). Pre-tournament rating_diff is the dominant predictor (+0.562 goals per 100 Elo). Group->KO GD corr = +0.258 (p=0.000, n=241); raw lag-1 GD autocorr = +0.138 (p=0.000); rating-adjusted lag-1 autocorr = +0.083 (p=0.002). This is a small-sample question: in-cup form carries a modest signal that is weak-to-moderate and largely subsumed by pre-tournament strength. Weight group results lightly when forecasting knockout games.
